description: Phase 6: Add tests/tasks/test_store.py for FileTaskStore (CRUD, deps, ready, search, concurrent access). Add tests/tasks/test_cli.py for CLI commands. Update tests: test_queue.py mock task store instead of bd ready, test_ready.py same, test_release.py mock store instead of bd search/show, test_scaffold.py remove bd init assertions. Rename test_beads_client.py→test_task_store_client.py, test_beads_integrators.py→test_task_hooks.py. Delete tests/probes/test_beads.py. Keep bd-xxxx ID format in all tests.
title: Write tests for TaskStore and update existing test mocks

description: Extend village/locks.py lock file format to include spec metadata: name, iteration, model. Lock files in .village/locks/ should track which spec is being worked on, how many iterations have been attempted, and which model is being used. Backward compatible with existing lock format.
title: Extend lock format with spec metadata

description: Phase 4: Create Village-managed git hooks in .village/hooks/ that replace .beads/hooks/. prepare-commit-msg hook reads current task from worktree/lock and injects task context. Hook installer in 'village up' symlinks .village/hooks/* to .git/hooks/. Removes all dependency on bd hooks run.
title: Reimplement git hooks in .village/hooks/

description: Phase 3: Add 'village tasks' Click command group with subcommands: list, show, create, ready, update, dep, delete, search. All with --json flag support. Update village builder run and village queue to use task store. Makes Village self-contained for task management with no external CLI dependency.
title: Add village tasks CLI command group

description: Phase 5: Delete beads_client.py, probes/beads.py, beads_integrators.py. Remove .beads/ from scaffold gitignore template. Remove beads_integrator_module from config.py. Remove needs_beads_init from runtime.py. Remove BeadsClient/BeadsError imports from cli/greeter.py and chat/llm_chat.py. Remove BeadsTaskSpec/extract_beads_specs from task_extractor.py. Rename BeadsIntegrator→TaskHooks across codebase. Remove bd init from scaffold step 6. Remove beads_available/beads_capable checks everywhere.
title: Remove all beads references and clean up

description: Phase 2: Refactor all ~15 call sites that currently call bd CLI via subprocess. Replace queue.py, ready.py, release.py, contracts.py, github_integration.py, conversation.py, subcommands.py, etc. Replace beads_client.py (delete), refactor task_extractor.py, simplify initialization.py. Delete probes/beads.py, create probes/tasks.py. Update extensibility: rename BeadsIntegrator to TaskHooks. Pattern: from village.tasks import get_task_store; store = get_task_store(); store.get_ready_tasks() etc.
title: Replace beads subprocess calls with TaskStore API

description: Core loop module with: find_incomplete_specs(specs_dir), check_spec_completion(spec_path), detect_promise(pane_output), monitor_pane(pane_id, timeout), run_loop(specs_dir, parallel=1, max_iterations=None, model=None, dry_run=False). Reads specs/*.md files, tracks completion via Status field, detects promise signals, monitors tmux pane output, retries on failure. Sequential by default, parallel support later.
title: Implement village/loop.py — spec-driven autonomous build loop

description: Add 'village planner inspect' subcommand to village/cli/planner.py. Supports: planner inspect (review all specs, read-only report), planner inspect <spec-id> (review one spec), planner inspect --fix (review + amend specs with Inspect Notes section), planner inspect --fix <spec-id>. Uses existing workflow engine LLM infrastructure. Defaults to higher-reasoning model (configurable via role models in .village/config).
title: Add planner inspect subcommand

description: Modify village/cli/builder.py: add 'run' subcommand with -p/--parallel (default 1), --max-iterations, --model flags. 'builder run' scans specs/ for incomplete specs, runs the autonomous loop via village.loop.run_loop(). Remove old 'builder run <workflow>' (no hidden alias needed). Keep builder status/stop/resume/logs subcommands as stubs. Default 'builder' command prompts for spec selection.
title: Add builder run subcommand and refactor builder CLI

description: Extend village/contracts.py to generate contracts that include spec context (requirements, acceptance criteria, completion signal). When builder run processes a spec, the injected contract should contain the full spec content so the agent knows what to implement and how to signal completion. Supports both opencode and pi agent types.
title: Add spec-aware contract generation

description: Update AGENTS.md with: spec file format (numbered markdown, Status field, requirements, acceptance criteria, promise signals), builder run usage examples, planner inspect usage, how the loop replaces both ralph-loop.sh and the old workflow-run builder. Remove/update references to old builder run <workflow> pattern.
title: Document spec format and builder loop architecture in AGENTS.md

close_reason: Phase 1 complete: TaskStore ABC, FileTaskStore (JSONL), models, ID generation all implemented and tested
description: Phase 1: Create village/tasks/ module with models.py (Task, TaskCreate, TaskUpdate, TaskStatus dataclasses), store.py (TaskStore ABC + FileTaskStore JSONL backend), ids.py (bd-xxxx ID generation), and __init__.py (get_task_store factory). FileTaskStore uses .village/tasks.jsonl for storage, fcntl file locking for concurrent safety, append-only writes with compaction on delete. Methods: create_task, get_task, list_tasks, search_tasks, update_task, delete_task, get_ready_tasks (dep-satisfied+open), get_dependencies, add_label, get_prime_context, initialize.
title: Implement TaskStore ABC and FileTaskStore
